untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'previous swing low' and 'lower high formation' across multiple bars with specific swing point identification logic. The allowed indicators do not include a dedicated swing point tracker. Using pivot support level (s1) as proxy approximation, but true swing low identification requires multi-bar pattern recognition beyond single-bar indicator constraints. Volume confirmation threshold percentile also requires calibration (set placeholder at 1.5x vol_ratio_20).
translation_notes: Translated 'lower high' as close < prev_high, 'breakdown below previous swing low' as close < s1 (pivot support proxy), and 'volume confirmation' as vol_ratio_20 > 1.5. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal behavior depends on trend context. Original swing-point logic would require custom pattern detection.
